parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
  "temperature": 0.1,
  "max_tokens": 600,
  "response_format": { "type": "json_object" },
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are a senior recruiter at Pearl Talent evaluating candidates for the Recruitment Coordinator (A320) role. Respond ONLY with valid JSON — no markdown, no explanation outside the JSON."
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Evaluate this candidate against the Recruitment Coordinator (A320) role at Pearl Talent.

## JOB REQUIREMENTS
Must-Haves:
- 2-4+ years of recruiting coordination or recruiting operations experience
- Hands-on Ashby ATS experience (day-one proficiency required)
- Strong organizational and multitasking skills across multiple open roles
- Excellent written and verbal English communication
- Proven ability to work with urgency in fast-paced, high-growth environments
- High level of ownership, accountability, and attention to detail

Nice-to-Haves:
- Experience with technical, operational, and leadership role hiring
- Startup or high-growth environment exposure
- Recruiting workflow automation experience
- Remote/distributed team experience
- Strong async communication habits

Key responsibilities: Interview scheduling, pipeline tracking, ATS management, candidate communication, workflow automation (45% coordination, 25% ops support, 20% automation, 10% communication).

Locations accepted: Philippines, LATAM, Anywhere remote.

## CANDIDATE
Name: {{ $json.name }}
Location: {{ $json.location }}
Years of experience: {{ $json.years_experience }}
Current role: {{ $json.current_role }}
ATS experience: {{ $json.ats_experience }}
English level: {{ $json.english_level }}
Startup experience: {{ $json.startup_experience }}
Automation experience: {{ $json.automation_experience }}
Remote experience: {{ $json.remote_experience }}
Summary: {{ $json.summary }}

## SCORING INSTRUCTIONS
Score each dimension 1-10. Then compute overall_score as weighted average:
- ashby_score × 0.30 (critical: must have day-one proficiency)
- coordination_score × 0.25
- english_score × 0.20
- startup_score × 0.15
- automation_score × 0.10

Tier classification (based on overall_score):
- Strong Yes: overall_score >= 7.5
- Yes: overall_score >= 6.0
- Maybe: overall_score >= 4.5
- No: overall_score < 4.5

Respond with this exact JSON structure:
{
  "ashby_score": <1-10>,
  "coordination_score": <1-10>,
  "english_score": <1-10>,
  "startup_score": <1-10>,
  "automation_score": <1-10>,
  "overall_score": <1.0-10.0, one decimal>,
  "tier": "Strong Yes|Yes|Maybe|No",
  "top_strengths": "<2-3 specific strengths, comma-separated>",
  "main_gap": "<single most critical gap or 'None'>",
  "recommendation": "<1-2 sentence hiring recommendation>"
}"
    }
  ]
}
